task_completion.description: Agent searches for or navigates to the specific complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase search bar or case list shows the case number (read from /tmp/complaint_case_number.txt) or the title 'Public Records Request - Water Quality Data'.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the case details page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase UI displays the case details page for 'Public Records Request - Water Quality Data', showing the original assignee (arkcase-admin).

task_completion.description: Agent opens the edit or reassignment dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, dropdown, or edit screen is open in the ArkCase UI specifically for modifying the case assignee.
The name 'Sally Acm' or username 'sally-acm' is typed, highlighted, or selected in the assignee input field.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the changes and the case reflects the new assignee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case details page shows 'Sally Acm' (or sally-acm@dev.arkcase.com) as the current assignee, and the case title remains exactly 'Public Records Request - Water Quality Data'.

integrity.description: Agent used the ArkCase web interface to perform the reassignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ArkCase web application in a browser, not terminal commands (like curl) interacting with the API.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify other case properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: The case title, status, and priority remain unchanged in the final screenshots compared to the initial state.
The UI shows a success notification or the updated case details page, rather than just leaving the edit dialog open without saving.
